{{ $cur := .Site.Params.version }} {{ $latest := .Site.Params.latest }} {{ $versions := .Site.Data.versions.versions }} {{/* Only render on release branches — main content redirects to latest, so there's nothing to switch between from the root. */}} {{ if and $versions (ne $cur "main") }} {{/* Strip the version path prefix that Hugo bakes into RelPermalink when the site is built with a versioned baseURL (e.g. /v0.1/overview/ → /overview/). main is always built at the root, so nothing to strip there. */}} {{ $prefix := cond (ne $cur "main") (printf "/v%s" $cur) "" }} {{ $pagePath := .RelPermalink | strings.TrimPrefix $prefix }} {{/* "Latest" when explicitly marked or when no release exists yet. */}} {{ $isLatest := or (not $latest) (eq $cur $latest) }}
Version
{{ range $versions }} {{ $isActive := eq .version $cur }} {{ $label := cond (ne .version "main") (printf "v%s" .version) "main" }} {{ $href := $.RelPermalink }} {{ if not $isActive }} {{ if .url }} {{ $href = printf "%s%s" .url $pagePath }} {{ else }} {{ $href = $pagePath }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ $label }} {{ if and $latest (eq .version $latest) }}Latest{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
